response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for the song 'Koi wa Sensou' starting at 03:51. I have discarded the leftover JSON lyrics that were not performed in this video segment. For the second verse starting at 04:47, which was not included in the JSON reference, I relied on the on-screen lyrics and audio to confirm the transcription ('灰色の雲', etc.). Timestamps are precisely aligned with vocal activation and termination, with tight wrapping to prevent cascading delays. Spoken English dialogue in the gameplay segment is also transcribed for contextual continuity.

subtitles.original: Oh yeah? Okay, we're gonna make it harder then!
subtitles.english: Oh yeah? Okay, we're gonna make it harder then!

subtitles.original: Oh boy! This is not fair at all!
subtitles.english: Oh boy! This is not fair at all!

subtitles.original: You guys are cheating! This is not fair!
subtitles.english: You guys are cheating! This is not fair!

subtitles.original: Well, you know guys, today is my 3D debut, right?
subtitles.english: Well, you know guys, today is my 3D debut, right?

subtitles.original: So maybe, you know, senpais... give me the pizza?
subtitles.english: So maybe, you know, senpais... give me the pizza?

subtitles.original: We have prepared a special stage for you!
subtitles.english: We have prepared a special stage for you!

subtitles.original: We kind of want to see your cool side!
subtitles.english: We kind of want to see your cool side!

subtitles.original: My cool side? Really? Show it off to everyone!
subtitles.english: My cool side? Really? Show it off to everyone!

subtitles.original: Maybe put those angry feelings into your next song!
subtitles.english: Maybe put those angry feelings into your next song!

subtitles.english: Love is War / Lyrics, Music: ryo (supercell)
